message.content:
@startuml
actor user
participant "InspectionSheetForm" as InspectionSheetForm
participant "EquipmentForm" as EquipmentForm
participant "InspectionItemForm" as InspectionItemForm
participant "InspectionitemDialog" as InspectioinitemDialog
entity "InspectionsheetContext" as inspectionsheetcontext
database "inspectionitemContexct" as inspectionitemcontexct


== Add New Equipment == 
user ->>  InspectionSheetForm :点検機器追加ボタンをクリック\n
activate InspectionSheetForm
    activate equipmentform
        InspectionSheetForm->equipmentform:点検機器追加 \n
        
            activation equipmentform
            
                equipmentform-->inspectionsheetcontext:点検シート情報
                
                    activate inspectionsheetcontext
                    
                        deactivate inspectionsheetcontext
                        
                            return 
            
        
            
                
                    
                        
                            
                                equipmentform --> equipmentform :描画処理
                                
                                    activate equipmentform
                                    
                                        deactive equipmentform
                                        
                                            return  
                                            
                                                end 
        
    
    

activation equipmentform
    
    
    
    
    
    
    



@enduml
